subtitle: Korean folktales for bedtime
ageRatingTarget: 4+ or Kids Category pending policy review
descriptionDraft: Moon Jar Stories is a calm bilingual storybook app for families reading Korean folktales together. Read in English-first mode, switch to Korean text, listen to packaged narration, and explore gentle picture-book scenes without ads, child accounts, child-facing links, or live generation in the child app.
